**Network Security Incident Report**

**Incident Date:** 2026-04-27  
**Report Prepared By:** Security Operations

**Summary:**  
On the morning of the incident, monitoring tools detected unusual outbound traffic from an internal workstation, along with repeated failed login attempts against a privileged application account. The activity was quickly escalated for investigation. Initial review suggests the source may have been a compromised endpoint rather than a broader network intrusion.

**Observed Indicators:**  
The affected asset generated connections to several unfamiliar external IP addresses and attempted to access services outside normal business patterns. Endpoint logs also showed anomalous script execution and a temporary spike in CPU usage. No confirmed evidence of data exfiltration has been identified at this time.

**Current Status:**  
Containment is in place pending full malware analysis and root-cause determination. A follow-up report will be issued after forensic validation and remediation are complete.
